name: Proteus Radius

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: B3107BAA-9C6A-4CAE-8E0E-086B2DF0FF8D

comment:
The PROTEUS RADIUS is a compact IP66 High Intensity Beam FX fixture. 
Utilizing an efficient 100W Solid State Phosphor-Converted (SSPC) light engine the fixture projects narrow intense beams with incredible power at long distances. 
Incredibly fast 360 Degree of Movement on both axis allow impactful beam animations, while the CMY color mix, gobos, prisms and frost options allow the designer to compose an endless array of stunning aerial effects.

capabilities.comment: Forwards Pan rotation from fast to slow
Backwards Pan rotation from slow to fast
Forwards Tilt rotation from fast to slow
Backwards Tilt rotation from slow to fast

gwSpecs.description:
The PROTEUS RADIUS is a compact IP66 High Intensity Beam FX fixture. 
Utilizing an efficient 100W Solid State Phosphor-Converted (SSPC) light engine the fixture projects narrow intense beams with incredible power at long distances. 
Incredibly fast 360 Degree of Movement on both axis allow impactful beam animations, while the CMY color mix, gobos, prisms and frost options allow the designer to compose an endless array of stunning aerial effects.
